name: Pool Safe Inc.
summary: Pool Safe Inc. manufactures and sells pool safe products in the United States. The company offers PoolSafe, a product that functions as a multi-purpose safe, beverage cooler and holder, and server call-button, as well as a solar-powered charger for USB compatible devices, including phones, cameras, and tablets. It serves owners and operators of hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise ships. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
